request: Add alpha-period safety belt to .releaserc.json: cap main at 0.x via `range: "0.x"` branch modifier; map breaking-change commits to minor bumps via `{ breaking: true, release: "minor" }` releaseRule. Prevents accidental 1.0.0 escalation during alpha; lets BREAKING CHANGE during 0.x cut minor (0.N+1.0) per semver convention.
